source_name: Appointment of Date of Coming into Operation - Companies (Amendment) Act 2024 [Act A1701] (sections 4, 26 and 28 of Act A1701)
content:
appoints 30 November 2024 as the date on which sections 4, 26 and 28 of the Act
comes into operation.
